metadata.raw_response_text:
# INTERNAL MEMO

**TO:** Warehouse Team Members

**FROM:** [Your Name], Operations Manager

**DATE:** [Date]

**RE:** Holiday Season Shift Schedule Change

---

As we approach the holiday season and prepare for increased order volume, we will be implementing a modified shift schedule to ensure we can meet customer demand and maintain efficient operations.

**Effective Date:** [Insert Date]

**New Schedule:**

- **Shift 1:** [Start Time] – [End Time]
- **Shift 2:** [Start Time] – [End Time]
- **Shift 3 (Added):** [Start Time] – [End Time]

**Key Changes:**

- The morning shift will begin 30 minutes earlier starting [date].
- A third shift will be added on [days of the week] to handle increased volume.
- All shifts will include a 30-minute unpaid meal break.

**What This Means for You:**

- Your specific shift assignment will be communicated by your direct supervisor by [date].
- If you have scheduling preferences or conflicts, please speak with your supervisor as soon as possible.
- Overtime may be available for those interested. Sign up with your supervisor.

We appreciate your flexibility and hard work during this busy time. Your dedication helps us deliver for our customers and supports our team's success.

If you have any questions about the new schedule, please contact your supervisor or the Operations office at [phone number/email].

Thank you for your continued commitment.

---

**[Your Name]**
Operations Manager
